payload.text: Quando é Split Editorial, imagem meia tela, o lado do texto não é possível alterar a cor do background, fica preto fixo

**Addressing the Template Bug**

I'm focusing on the "Split Editorial" template, specifically the `IMAGE_SPLIT_HALF` variant. My main concern is the hardcoded background color (`bg-zinc-950`) on the text side. This fixed color prevents users from customizing the background via the color palette, which I aim to resolve. I'm exploring methods to allow palette-driven color control.


**Refining the Color Handling**

I've been drilling into the `IMAGE_SPLIT_HALF` logic in `renderers/SlideCanvas.tsx` today. Specifically, I zeroed in on the `renderLayoutInternal` function and the `isSideBySide` block. The culprit is the hardcoded `bg-zinc-950` class, which I plan to replace with `theme.colors.background` for palette integration. My next steps are to integrate the fix and also ensure the same consistency in the `isVertical` flow.

entries.description: Updated split layouts to use dynamic background color from theme instead of fixed zinc-950.
